---
title: "The Hon. Margaret A\'Court"
---

## The Hon. Margaret A\'Court

**Dates:** (1855-1933)

### Description

nun

### Biography

Daughter of the 2nd Lord Heytesbury, she appears to have joined the Wantage Sisterhood.  She subscribed to The Net.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1897 or later?[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
